about.title: ABOUT OUR COMPANY
about.description: Zwippetech Inc., a U.S.-based company, develops B2B and B2C financial services and addresses other specialized programming needs for our clients. Zelify, a business line and brand of Zwippetech Inc., focuses on specialized development in the U.S. and Latin American regions.
